Originally from New York and now based in Miami, I discovered Pilates after a back injury — it completely transformed my body, strength, and life. That healing journey inspired me to create Elle Pilates: a private, personalized experience for those who value precision, luxury, and transformation.

I specialize in 1:1 private and virtual Pilates coaching — blending classical technique with modern athletic flow to help you feel stronger, longer, and pain-free. Each session is curated to your goals, energy, and lifestyle.

• 200-Hour RYT Yoga Instructor
• Prenatal/Postnatal Certified

See you in class 🤍

description:
My name is Troy van spanje. I’m a personal trainer and gym owner in Sydney Australia. Since starting on the fitness industry in 2004 my passion has been to educate and help people in the realm of health, fitness and strength training. My goal for this channel is to provide tips, motivation and follow along workouts for those who I can’t reach on my personal training studio Inpower Fitness and further pass on the knowledge I have learned from my mentors over the last 18 years. You can see my channel is ever evolving as I find new ways to educate and through experience of working with people everyday and what they want and need. Collaborations are welcome in all forms of fitness content so just reach out to me at my personal email address.
